videos.title: The Hotline Got Flooded  We Answered the Best Ones
videos.description:
First things first... thank you. Genuinely. You flooded The Hotline with questions and we mean flooded. The response was so overwhelming we had to sit down, go through a lot of them, and pick just a few of the best ones. Which was both flattering and mildly terrifying. You people are not messing around.This one is for every single person who took the time to send in a question. You made this episode happen. We just showed up and answered things.

#TheHotline #JeepLife 

Welcome to The Hotline! W

videos.title: Power Apps Code Apps + Power Automate Flows 🚀  (NEW feature)
videos.description:
Power Apps Code Apps just unlocked one of the most-requested capabilities: calling Power Automate cloud flows directly from your React code — with typed inputs, typed responses, and full IntelliSense. 

In this full tutorial I walk through the entire workflow end-to-end, from the npm CLI commands to writing the React code that triggers the flow, passes parameters, and handles the response.
